title: Indian Peas Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice-based dish from India, made with juicy peas and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of ghee or oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add onion and ginger and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add fresh peas and mix well. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add basmati rice to the pan and mix well with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the pan with a lid.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.
